title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Jawaharlal Institute of Post-Graduate Medical Education and Research, Puducherry Act, 2008. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1 14th July, 2008, vide notification No. S.O. 1672(E), dated 14th July, 2008, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
